Off Calendar Feb-13-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: DOUGLAS PROVENCHER, ESQ., 707.284.2380, FOR PLAINTIFF CREDITOR'S TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC.
GREG MORENO, 559.469.7882, DEFENDANT IN PRO PER.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC., DBA GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION BUREAU'S Motion For An Order Appointing Michael Brewer As Receiver In Place Of Richard B. Cole IS Denied. The prior order did not specifically refer to this case. Any problems can be dealt with in response to any accounting. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
